# kSecMatchLimitOne

**Global Variable**

A value that corresponds to matching exactly one item.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecMatchLimitOne: CFString
```

## Discussion

Use this value with the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecMatchLimit] key.
